response.step_by_step_log: Observed two characters singing 'Melodies of Life' throughout the entire video. Identified the source as 'Final Fantasy IX'. Performed a search for the lyrics using: 'Melodies of Life Final Fantasy IX Japanese and English lyrics'. Found matching lyrics for both versions.
response.global_summary: A performance of 'Melodies of Life' from Final Fantasy IX by Hololive members Hakui Koyori and Tsunomaki Watame.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori and Tsunomaki Watame perform 'Melodies of Life' on a stage with a virtual background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ate mo naku samayotte ita
Tegakari mo naku sagashi tsuzuketa
Anata ga kureta omoide o
Kokoro o iyasu uta ni shite

Yakusoku mo naku kawasu kotoba mo
Kimeru koto mo sezu dakishime
Soshite tashikameta hibi wa
Nidoto wa kaeranu

Watashi no na o yobu koto ga deki
Kiru no?

Kagayaku yume ni kikaete

Inochi wa tsuzuku
Yoru o koe
Utagau koto no nai asu e
Shita e to tsuzuku
Ashi ta e to tsuzuku

Wakanderu

Kagiri

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Alone for a while I've been searching through the dark
For traces of the love you left inside my lonely heart
To weave by picking up the pieces that remain
Melodies of life - love's lost refrain

Our paths, they did cross, though I cannot say just why
We met, we laughed, we held on fast, and then we said goodbye
And who'll hear the echos of stories never told?
Let them ring out loud 'til they unfold

In my dearest memories, I see you reaching out to me
Though you're gone, I still believe that you can call out my name
A voice from the past, joining yours and mine
Adding up the layers of harmony

And so it goes, on and on
Melodies of life, to the sky beyond the flying birds
Forever and on
If I should leave this lonely world behind
Your voice will still remember our melody.
